title: Transcripts and other historical materials
summary: This page is a navigation/indexing portal on the Federal Reserve website that describes the types of historical FOMC documents available (transcripts, statements, SEP, Tealbooks, Greenbooks, Bluebooks, minutes, etc.). It does not contain any specific FOMC content, decisions, data releases, or research—it merely catalogs document categories and provides access instructions.
key_points: Page is a navigation/indexing portal for FOMC historical document types, not an actual source of FOMC content
Describes document categories: transcripts, policy statements, SEP, Tealbooks, Greenbooks, Bluebooks, minutes, agendas, Beige Books, memoranda, Redbooks
Provides metadata descriptions of each document type (e.g., Tealbook A covers economic conditions, Tealbook B covers policy alternatives)
Contains no specific FOMC decisions, economic data, or policy content
No URL provided in source metadata
No publication date for this specific page
why_it_matters: This source cannot be used for finance research as it contains no substantive content—it is purely a document catalog providing access pathways to FOMC materials.

issues_found: Source URL is empty - missing source attribution per Rule 6
Publication date is empty - no temporal context available
Source is a navigation_page (container page) per Rule 5 - must reject
Source contains no substantive content - only catalog descriptions of FOMC document types
event_type is 'unknown' which is technically valid for this page type but confirms lack of archiveable event
No specific FOMC decisions, data, policy content, or research present - cannot serve as macro catalyst source

notes: Source is a Federal Reserve website index page describing available FOMC historical document types. Contains no specific FOMC content, decisions, economic data, or research.
